Perf Check: LCP < 2.5s; product images lazy WebP; pagination no CLS; filter no render-block
SEO Check: Title unique; meta desc; H1; BreadcrumbList schema; canonical; no duplicate pagination URLs
A11y Check: Filter sidebar keyboard accessible; img alts on cards; pagination ARIA labeled; skip-to-results
Security Check: Product data from trusted source only; search input sanitized; affiliate IDs not exposed
Content Check: Product names/prices correct; affiliate disclaimer visible; INR pricing; out-of-stock labeled
Functional Check: Filters update results; sort (price asc/desc) works; pagination works; card click → detail page
Notes: Test 0-results state and full-results state on mobile

Perf Check: LCP < 2.5s; category card images WebP lazy; no CLS
SEO Check: Title: Shop by Category; meta desc; H1; Sitemap included
A11y Check: Category img alts; card focus states; keyboard nav grid
Security Check: No sensitive data; category slugs validated
Content Check: Category names accurate; all categories have products; no empty categories without state
Functional Check: Each card navigates to /category/[slug]; count shown if present
Notes: Add empty state if a category has zero products

Perf Check: LCP < 2.5s; brand logos WebP lazy; alphabetical list loads fast
SEO Check: Title: Shop by Brand; meta desc; H1; Schema:ItemList; Sitemap
A11y Check: Logo alts; keyboard navigable; search box ARIA labeled
Security Check: Slug validated server-side; no private brand data exposed
Content Check: Brand logos current; names correctly spelled; all brands have products; search works
Functional Check: Brand search/filter works; each card → /brand/[brandName]; logos load
Notes: Ensure logos are trademark-compliant and up to date

Perf Check: Comparison table no CLS; product images optimized; fast initial load
SEO Check: Title unique; meta desc; H1; noindex if entirely dynamic; canonical
A11y Check: Table accessible with th/td headers; keyboard navigable; screen reader reads comparison
Security Check: Product IDs in URL validated server-side; no price injection; comparison data server-verified
Content Check: Price data accurate; feature comparison correct; affiliate disclosure present; source links correct
Functional Check: Add/remove product works; price loads correctly; Buy/View links navigate correctly
Notes: Test with 2 products and 3 products; test empty/single product state

Perf Check: Search results < 2s; debounce on input; lazy-load result images; no CLS
SEO Check: Title: Search '[query]' dynamic; noindex search result pages; no-cache for uniqueness
A11y Check: Search input ARIA labeled; results list accessible; loading state announced; keyboard nav
Security Check: Query sanitized server-side; no XSS via search param; rate limiting on search API
Content Check: Results relevant; sponsored results labeled separately; affiliate disclaimer on results; zero-results suggests alternatives
Functional Check: Search returns results; filters refine; pagination/load-more works; click → product; analytics fires
Notes: 🔴 Test XSS injection via ?q= query param — must be sanitized server-side

Perf Check: Deal cards lazy-load; LCP < 2.5s; countdown no CLS; images WebP
SEO Check: Title: Best Deals Today; meta desc; H1; Schema:ItemList; OG image; Sitemap
A11y Check: Deal cards accessible; countdown ARIA live region; keyboard nav
Security Check: Deal data server-side only; no price manipulation client-side; affiliate links validated
Content Check: Prices accurate vs source; discount % correct; deals current not expired; affiliate disclosure
Functional Check: Deal click fires tracking; Buy Now → affiliate; countdown counts down; refresh loads new deals
Notes: Test expired deal behavior — should not render after expiry

Perf Check: Sale banner image optimized; product grid lazy; LCP < 2.5s
SEO Check: Title: Sale - CloudBasket; meta desc; H1; Schema:OfferCatalog; Sitemap
A11y Check: Sale banner alt text; product grid accessible; keyboard nav
Security Check: Sale data server-validated; no price injection; no fake urgency claims
Content Check: Sale prices correct; original prices shown; discount legitimate; Indian Consumer Protection Act 2019 compliant
Functional Check: Sale items load; Buy link fires tracking; discounted price displayed correctly
Notes: Ensure no misleading discounts — Indian Consumer Protection Act 2019 applies

Perf Check: Quiz renders fast; no CLS on answer selection; progress bar smooth
SEO Check: Title: Find Your Perfect Product; meta desc; H1; noindex quiz steps; result page canonical
A11y Check: Step nav keyboard accessible; answer options ARIA labeled; progress bar screen-reader readable
Security Check: Answer data not manipulable client-side; recommendation logic server-side; no PII stored without consent
Content Check: Quiz questions relevant; result recommendations accurate; affiliate disclosure on results; privacy note if data collected
Functional Check: Each step progresses; back nav works; results load; recommended products link correctly; restart works
Notes: Test all quiz paths — ensure no dead-end recommendation result
